turns.user_message: I noticed I'm getting really impatient with small things at work. That used to not bother me at all.
My patience is completely gone now, and I snap at every little request. I used to be so much calmer about this stuff.
I feel this hot anger bubble up over nothing, and I can't control it anymore. The person I was before would never recognize me now.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something they noticed about themselves. This used to not bother the speaker.
